title: AngleResult
description: Result returned by one han-review angle agent. Strict-mode compatible (all properties required, additionalProperties:false) so it works with Codex --output-schema and Claude --json-schema. The synthesis stage tracks 'refuted' in memory; it is intentionally NOT part of the angle output contract.

applicable.description: false when the diff touches nothing in this angle's scope (self-skip).

path.description: File path relative to repo root.

line.description: Line in the new file; 0 if not line-specific.

detail.description: What's wrong and why it matters.

evidence.description: Grounding for the finding — a falsifiable check (repro/test/command) — and/or the angle's concrete proposed fix. For any actionable finding, include the proposed fix: it is the domain expert's remedy that the architect-led synthesis weighs for cost (synthesis must not author a fix outside its own expertise). At least one of check/fix is required; findings with neither are dropped.
